title: Zunkiree Search
description: Answers questions from your data directly — no link-hunting. 50+ connectors, natural language out of the box, 2-hour integration. Cuts support queries by 45%.

title: Stella
tagline: The sales agent that never clocks out.
description: AI sales agent that handles discovery, questions, and checkout — 24/7. Supports eSewa, Khalti, and international payments from day one.

title: Zenly
description: AI reminders cut no-shows by 35%. Handles availability, multi-resource conflicts, and scheduling automatically — for clinics, studios, and any service business.

title: AI CRM
tagline: CRM that sells. Not just stores.
description: Predicts which leads convert, triggers outreach automatically, and flags deals going cold. CRM that acts on your pipeline — not just stores it.

title: Gaamma
description: Production planning, inventory, quality control, and analytics — one platform. Replace fragmented spreadsheets with a single source of truth your factory runs on.

title: Dental AI Assistant
description: Automates patient communication, scheduling, and follow-up reminders. Front desk time shifts from admin to patients. Built for dental practices in Nepal.
